assertionResults.observation: Public issue #28 records PR #38 final head cf4ce450882f110c92d60e01f8580dc851111eb3 and all-green run 29162394115 covering persisted intents, reload, replacement, confirmation, reorg, timeout, and unknown submission in deterministic wallet fixtures. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: The reviewed owner, chain, deployment, pool, route, recipient, settings fingerprint, nonce, and original hash persist before and after reload.

Public issue #28 records PR #38 final head cf4ce450882f110c92d60e01f8580dc851111eb3 and all-green run 29162394115 covering persisted intents, reload, replacement, confirmation, reorg, timeout, and unknown submission in deterministic wallet fixtures. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: A same-nonce replacement hash is attached to the same intent rather than creating a second swap intent.

Public issue #28 records PR #38 final head cf4ce450882f110c92d60e01f8580dc851111eb3 and all-green run 29162394115 covering persisted intents, reload, replacement, confirmation, reorg, timeout, and unknown submission in deterministic wallet fixtures. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Only the canonical replacement receipt may finalize the intent; the superseded hash is never shown as a separate success.

Public issue #28 records PR #38 final head cf4ce450882f110c92d60e01f8580dc851111eb3 and all-green run 29162394115 covering persisted intents, reload, replacement, confirmation, reorg, timeout, and unknown submission in deterministic wallet fixtures. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Monitoring resumes without another wallet prompt or nonce increment.

environment.operatingSystem: GitHub-hosted Linux and independently recorded exact-head validation
environment.stack: Feather SDK, web, RPC, indexer, and transaction fixture suites
